title: Bridge Essay: Correlations between brain changes and pain management after cognitive and medit

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Language as mantra — mantra meditation, inner speech, focused attention, verbal repetition.

**Correlations between brain changes and pain management after cognitive and meditative therapies: Asystematic review of neuroimaging studies.** — Complement Ther Med. PMID: 30012384. DOI: 10.1016/j.ctim.2018.06.006. There are different ways of dealing with pain and cognitive and meditative therapies (CMT) are alternative ways to regulate the emotions associated with pain. Current studies apply neuroimaging techniques trying to elucidate the neural mechanisms of cognitive strategies for pain. This systematic review aimed to summarize the evidence on brain activity changes after CMT, which include cognitive behavioral therapy, mindfulness and/or meditation, for pain management as well as to evaluate clinical...

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 9 (Language/Mantra). Evaluation: Good (score=3.0)
